title: Tests should be skipped explicitly
description: Tests should be skipped explicitly using the unittest.skip() or pytest.mark.skip() to avoid flaky tests.
message: Test skipped without using unittest.skip() or pytest.mark.skip()
impact: Flaky tests can lead to false positives in the continuous integration pipeline.
recommendation: Use unittest.skip() or pytest.mark.skip() to explicitly skip tests.

noncompliant.description: Test function without any skipping mechanism.

why_is_this_an_issue: Flaky tests can lead to false positives in the continuous integration pipeline, causing delays and potential issues.
how_to_fix: Use unittest.skip() or pytest.mark.skip() to explicitly skip tests.
